title: Distribution Security Hardening
requirements: Mutual TLS (mTLS) for all inter-shard communication.
Automated secret rotation via HashiCorp Vault / AWS Secrets Manager.
Zero-trust network policy: Deny all by default.
Compliance: Law 151/2020 encryption at rest enforcement.

logic.identity: Assign unique SPIFFE ID to each regional shard.
logic.auditing: Ship all container logs to the global Security-Sentinel.
logic.containment: Isolate shard workloads using Kubernetes Namespaces.
